channel.title: Posts on Cyborg_m
channel.description: Recent content in Posts on Cyborg_m

item.title: Welcome — Who I Am
item.description:
I’m **Mayur Salve (Cyborg_m)** — a Penetration Tester, Ethical Hacker, and Security Researcher helping organizations find and fix vulnerabilities before attackers do.

I specialize in:

- Authentication Bypass

- Cache Poisoning & Cache Deception

- Information Disclosure

- Business Logic Flaws

- Server-Side Request Forgery (SSRF)

Currently offering **Web Application Penetration Testing**, **Network & Infrastructure Audits**, and **Full VAPT Reports** for companies looking to secure their digital assets.

📩 Interested in a security audit? Reach out at [mayurbughunter@gmail.com](mailto:mayurbughunter@gmail.com) or check out my [Services](/services) page.
